metadata.scriptContent: if docker compose version > /dev/null 2>&1; then docker compose ps -q 2>/dev/null | grep -q . && echo 'Containers already running, skipping.' || docker compose up -d; elif command -v docker-compose > /dev/null 2>&1; then docker-compose ps -q 2>/dev/null | grep -q . && echo 'Containers already running, skipping.' || docker-compose up -d; elif command -v podman-compose > /dev/null 2>&1; then podman ps -q --filter 'label=com.docker.compose.project=web' 2>/dev/null | grep -q . && echo 'Containers already running, skipping.' || podman-compose up -d; else echo 'ERROR: No container runtime found. Install Docker or Podman.' && exit 1; fi
